title: update gvproxy version
body:
The current macos installer gvproxy version has a number of issues around dns handling[1,2]. They should be fixed now in 0.8.3 as they reverted the dns changes back to the 0.7.5 code. This should make it work like it used to be. Our 5.3.2 installer ships the 0.7.5 version so users of the podman installer never noticed that but we got plenty of reports from brew users. This needs to be backported into v5.4 to make sure we do not ship the broken version as part of the installer.

[1] https://github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/issues/462
[2] https://github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/issues/466

For more information on release notes, please follow the Kubernetes model:
https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/release-notes.md
-->

```release-note
Update the bundled gvproxy version to 0.8.3
```
